title: COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING WASCO COUNTY COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. 1060 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 386-7534 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis line (541) 386-7534 Hood River County Crisis line (541) 296-6307 Wasco County Crisis line (541) 296-5452 Sherman County Toll-free (888) 877-9147 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING WASCO COUNTY
